name: Pecan Topped Graham Crackers
recipeInstructions:
Preheat oven to 375 degrees.
Break graham crackers into halves. Place the graham crackers close together, but not touching, on foil-covered cookie sheet.
In a small pan, melt margarine and sugar over low heat until boiling for 2 minutes.
Remove from heat and stir in vanilla. Pour mixture evenly over the graham crackers.
Place in oven and bake 5-10 minutes (watch closely; if the oven heats higher, it may take less than 5 minutes). The mixture will bubble when ready to remove.
Remove from oven and pour pecans over the crackers.
Let cool before placing on wax paper or foil.
